title: Incorrect Count of Trailing Zeros in Binary Representation

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.outputFormat: Output the count of trailing zeros in binary representation of `n`.
statement.notes: Note that the time complexity should be O(log n).

examples.explanation: Explanation: Binary representation of 12 is 1100, which has two trailing zeros.
Explanation: Binary representation of 25 is 11001, which has no trailing zeros.
